ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "fips" TEXT /* FIPS code of the country */,
  "genc" TEXT /* GENC code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country or area */,
  "iso2" TEXT /* ISO 2-letter country code */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO 3-letter country code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion within the geographical region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the capital city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the capital city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the group (e.g., 0 - 4 years) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group (e.g., Early Childhood) */,
  "start_age" INTEGER /* Starting age of the age group */,
  "end_age" INTEGER /* Ending age of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population entry */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Male population */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Female population */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Urban population */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Rural population */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density in people per square kilometer */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate per 1,000 people */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate per 1,000 people */,
  "migration_rate" REAL /* Net migration rate per 1,000 people */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth in years */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita in USD */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., national census, survey) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL or link to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "license" TEXT /* License or terms of use for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL or link to the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., demographic, economic) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset (e.g., 100 MB) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_population" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Name of the country or area
